untranslatable_reason: Head and Shoulders pattern formation cannot be expressed as simple indicator conditions. Pattern recognition requires multi-bar geometric analysis (shoulder height, head height, neckline level) which is not available in the allowed indicators. The signal references specific chart pattern detection that would require a dedicated pattern recognition module or candle/bar sequence analysis beyond the scope of allowed operators.
translation_notes: Translated only the rising volume trend component using vol_ratio comparison (volume > prev_volume). The core Head and Shoulders pattern logic (52% bull success, 41% bear success) requires explicit pattern detection. Conservatively applied volume confirmation as entry condition for both directions and mean-reversion exit using SMA_20. This is a partial translation covering volume confirmation only.
